description: This class includes post-harvest crop activities aimed at preparing agricultural products for the primary market.
includes: preparation of crops for primary markets: cleaning, trimming, grading, disinfecting
preparation of tobacco leaves, e.g. drying
preparation of cocoa beans, e.g. peeling
excludes: preparation of agricultural crops for primary markets by the producer, see divisions 01, 10 or 11
cleaning and preliminary preparation of tobacco leaves, see 0115
wholesale of agricultural raw materials, see 4620
